description: JCS (RFC 8785) profile for action_ref preimage — execution-join-ref-v1
name: jcs-rfc8785-action-ref-v1

timestamp.note: MUST be string — integer timestamp produces a different hash. Accepted formats: Unix ms as string (e.g. "1782900000000") or ISO 8601 (e.g. "2026-06-29T17:00:00.000Z"). Format must be consistent between signer and verifier.

superseded_reason: Original profile doc left duplicate_keys unpinned. All fields in this profile are strings, so numeric_domain is not_applicable. Additive tightening only. Old doc remains resolvable for evidence that already names it.
